title: Root
text: Home * Search * Node * Root The Root of the Search Tree is the initial position of the search . Many programmers dedicate a separate function for doing a root search, since using a different move ordering scheme may be beneficial. Also root search must return not only the value, but also the move which will be played. This in turn may require special care in case of a fail-low when using aspiration window . This is typically where the time management decisions are beneficial.
